latest_articles.title: Trump Cut a Billion-Dollar Mining Deal. His Sons Stand to Profit.
latest_articles.summary: An agreement between the U.S. and Kazakhstan has given a group of American investors with ties to the president and the commerce secretary access to one of the world’s largest untapped reserves of tungsten.
latest_articles.evidence: Trump Cut a Billion-Dollar Mining Deal. His Sons Stand to Profit.

latest_articles.title: Kazakhstan’s Leader Deepens U.S. Ties, Saying Trump Was ‘Sent by Heaven’
latest_articles.summary: The Central Asian nation is aggressively courting President Trump’s Washington to counterbalance its powerful neighbors, Russia and China.
